underlying_goal: Set up a custom skills directory with symlink to Claude's skills folder, with clear separation between user-created and auto-generated skills
friction_detail: User interrupted Claude twice and rejected the auto-generated subfolder approach, iterating to settle on a naming prefix convention instead.
brief_summary: User wanted to symlink their skills folder to Claude's skills directory with separation between custom and auto-generated skills; achieved after iterating on the organization approach.
